creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
To the OP of this pr(1)

If you'd like to pursue this; it should be enough
to open nginx/Makefile.extmod
scroll down to line 294 and change:
SMALL_LIGHT_USES=		magick:6
to
SMALL_LIGHT_USES=		magick:7

then build nginx. If everything works as intended,
submit a patch (git diff) with that change. :-)
